prompts: To make Yu Xiang Rou Si, start by slicing pork into thin strips and marinating in soy sauce, cooking wine, starch, and water. Prepare and slice bamboo shoots, wood ear mushrooms, and garlic. Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry ginger, garlic, and doubanjiang until fragrant. Add the pork and stir-fry until cooked. Add the vegetables, splashing in vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, and chicken stock. Stir well and adjust seasoning to taste, ensuring a spicy, savory sauce coats the meat and vegetables. Finish with a sprinkle of chopped green onions and serve hot.
